settlement.brackwater.name: Brackwater
settlement.brackwater.description: A salt-stained harbor town living off the shoals and the warren fields behind the dunes.
settlement.emberfall.name: Emberfall
settlement.emberfall.description: A highland forge town built over old tin seams, loud with hammers and quarry carts.
settlement.thornholt.name: Thornholt
settlement.thornholt.description: A timber settlement deep in the pinewood, where sawdust drifts like snow.
settlement.greywatch.name: Greywatch
settlement.greywatch.description: A crossroads waypost where every caravan eventually passes through.
